title: Juju's Elementary Sword
description: A datapack that add swords based on elements
body:
Did you ever found base minecraft weapon boring? If so this datapack is for you! This add many custom weapon each with their own unique hability and spawn mecanic!

List of feature:
- Thunder Hammer (Summun lightning on target impact even if its not raining) (Try getting shot by lightning holding a mace, rumors says it change its structure)
- Ice Sword (Freeze enemy on abilty impact - right click to activate) (Spawn in Ice Ruins)
- Ice Ruins (Rare structure in ice spike)

**THIS IS NOT THE FINISHED VERSION**

Feature planed to be added:
- Leaf Blade (Act has grapling hook)
- Fire Sword (Allow you to make a fire dash - right click to activate)

# This is currently not working in multiplayer
